german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant gap exists, with most positions accessible without German proficiency.

pm_type.title: Core PM Roles Dominate, Creating Significant Imbalance
pm_type.subtitle: A substantial gap exists between Core PM and other roles, limiting diversity in product management.

seniority.title: Hiring is spread across multiple levels
seniority.subtitle: No single seniority group clearly dominates the current market.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site arrangements over hybrid and remote work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 35% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 31% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Strong Balance and Diversity
industry.subtitle: No single role dominates, but unclassified positions limit overall accessibility.
